name: babysit-pr
tagline: Polls a GitHub PR's CI, reviews, and mergeability; auto-fixes branch-related CI failures and pushes until merged, closed, or blocked.
verdict: Thorough, deterministic automation: explicit stop conditions, output contract, flaky-vs-branch failure classification, and a consent gate before replying to human reviewers. Avoids destructive git and only touches the PR's own branch. Gaps: no negative-trigger/scope exclusions and no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope exclusions anywhere in the description or body.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
